issues.description: Trigger is wrong. Blocker activates when opponent declares an attack, not a generic Trigger. Should be OnAttack.
Action PlaySelf is incorrect. Blocker rests the card and changes attack target, not plays it. Should use Rest action with appropriate targeting/condition logic for redirecting attacks.
Missing condition that this is optional ('you may rest this card'). Blocker keyword requires optional activation, not forced action.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
